# Modern Reservation Logo SVG Assets

Design system: SmartHR-style token alignment

- Brand color: `#00c4cc` for logo/illustration usage
- Product accent: `#0077c7`
- Warm neutral background: `#f8f7f6`
- Border neutral: `#d6d3d0`
- No pure black, no semantic danger/warning colors

Files:
- `reservation-logo-master.svg` — scalable master SVG
- `reservation-logo-16x16.svg` — compact favicon SVG
- `reservation-logo-32x32.svg` — compact favicon SVG
- `reservation-logo-44x44.svg` — touch target / square symbol SVG
- `reservation-logo-180x180.svg` — apple-touch-icon source SVG
- `reservation-logo-512x512.svg` — PWA/shared source SVG
- `reservation-logo-180x180-tile.svg` — optional tile with warm Stone background
- `reservation-logo-512x512-tile.svg` — optional tile with warm Stone background
- `preview.svg` — visual size preview
